betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Neptunium-237§f

§aFissile radioisotope — used in schrabidium fuels and RBMK neutron fuel!§f

§bNeptunium-237§f is a radioisotope mainly used as fuel material, either by itself or as an additive for schrabidium fuels.

§6Properties§f:
§b• Radioactivity§f: §e2.5§f RAD/s
§b• Category§f: Fissile
§b• Atomic Number§f: §e93§f

§6Production§f:
§b• Breeding Reactor§f: breed §bU-235§f
§b• Desert Atom§f: found in structure loot
§b• Cyclotron§f: smash Lithium with natural Uranium

§6Uses§f:
§b• Schrabidium Fuels§f: fuel additive
§b• Breeding§f: Np-237 → Pu-238 (breeding reactor)
§b• Watz Power Plant§f: made into pellet — weak but cheap fuel
§b• RBMK Fuel§f: medium and highly enriched neptunium fuel (fast neutrons, no moderation needed)
§b• Custom Nuke§f: contributes §e30§f — the highest of any ingot!

§eTip§f: Neptunium's §e30§f contribution to the custom nuke makes it incredibly valuable for high-yield nuclear warheads. Set up U-235 breeding early to produce a steady supply!
